positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized celestial flora mandala illustration. The design features intertwining geometric lines, bioluminescent stylized flowers, and crescent moons forming a repeating, ornate pattern. The overall style should be a blend of Art Deco symmetry and deep cosmic mythology, rendered with crisp, clean vector lines and strong, isolated black silhouettes against a contrasting, ethereal gradient background (deep indigo to pale lilac). Central composition, perfect symmetry, high contrast, isolated print artwork, designed for screen printing on apparel.
